## Epic 7 — GM Tools (#84)

**Dependency:** #74, #81, #83
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 19 — GM Guidance, the Dungeon Architect's handbook.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Running the Game** — DA philosophy, pacing, improvisation
2. **Scene Management** — Player's Scene vs DA Scene (from original)
3. **Difficulty Guidelines** — Setting DCs, balancing encounters
4. **Encounter Building** — Combat, social, exploration encounter design
5. **Treasure & Rewards** — Gold, magic items, DP, reputation pacing
6. **NPC Creation** — Quick NPC templates, motivations, factions
7. **Worldbuilding** — Generic fantasy setting guidance
8. **Adjudicating Rules** — When to bend, when to hold
9. **Player Dynamics** — Handling different play styles, spotlight sharing
10. **Campaign Structure** — One-shots, arcs, full campaigns
11. **Optional Rules** — Variant systems the DA can enable

### Tasks
- [ ] Write DA philosophy section
- [ ] Write encounter building guidelines
- [ ] Write treasure/reward pacing
- [ ] Write optional rules section
- [ ] Adapt useful content from original PDF's GM sections
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: all mechanical chapters
